alkylation reagent: alkylated in 5.5 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature (RT) for 1 h each.
alkylation concentration: alkylated in 5.5 mM iodoacetamide at room temperature (RT) for 1 h each.
cleavage agent: pre-digested with LysC at RT for 3 h using a protein to protease ratio of 75:1.
collision energy: the top 12 most intense ions were selected for HCD fragmentation with an NCE of 27.
fragmentation method: the top 12 most intense ions were selected for HCD fragmentation.
instrument: Samples were measured on an EASY-nLC 1200 coupled to a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer.
labeling: Quantification was performed using label-free quantification (LFQ).
